llm_result.summary: Integrated Bio-Psycho-Social levers are proposed to address the eight changeable backlog domains (practical knowledge gaps, financial, household tasks, social maintenance, health self-management, time management, negative self-evaluation, and preserved baseline functioning) by combining skills training, environmental supports, social accountability, health behavior strategies, and measurement-based feedback to tailor progress and reduce the sense of falling behind.

solutions.solution_candidate: Structured daily planning with time-blocking, external task loading to a shared to-do system, and weekly accountability check-ins (coaching) to reduce backlog.
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Improved planning reduces task accumulation, increases task completion, and enhances self-efficacy, mitigating the feeling of being permanently behind.
solutions.measurement: Weekly on-time task completion rate; backlog days; schedule consistency (variance in wake times).
solutions.safety_notes: No safety concerns. Monitor for frustration; adjust pace if needed.
solutions.mapping_query: Map predictor to C06; implement with calendar/tasks app; track adherence to planned routines.

solutions.predictor_variable: Perceived lack of practical life knowledge (C01)
solutions.solution_candidate: Practical life skills micro-education with just-in-time checklists and quick-start guides; role-play rehearsals for common tasks (bills, cooking, scheduling).
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Providing procedural guidance reduces uncertainty and builds confidence in daily task execution.
solutions.measurement: Checklist completion rate; self-efficacy ratings; tasks completed independently.
solutions.mapping_query: Address C01 with micro-education modules; monitor confidence improvements.

solutions.solution_candidate: Automated budgeting with a user-friendly app + weekly money-management check-in with a coach or accountability buddy; automated reminders for bills.
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Clear budgeting routines and social accountability reduce financial backlog, financial stress, and cognitive load.
solutions.measurement: On-time bill payments; monthly budget variance; savings rate.
solutions.mapping_query: Tie C02 to budgeting tools and buddy support; monitor adherence and payment timing.

solutions.solution_candidate: Household routine redesign with time-blocked chores and a shared digital task board; assign small roles to household members; use reminders.
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Structured routines reduce backlog, improve perceived control, and lessen cognitive load from scattered tasks.
solutions.measurement: Chore completion rate; backlog days; satisfaction with home environment.
solutions.mapping_query: Support C03 through routine design and social delegation; track backlog reduction.

solutions.solution_candidate: Structured social plan with regular check-ins (friend or support group), calendar invites, and small rituals to maintain connections.
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Increased regular social contact reduces loneliness and improves mood, supporting overall functioning.
solutions.measurement: Number of social interactions per week; perceived connectedness; loneliness scale.
solutions.mapping_query: Address C04 via social routines; monitor social engagement and perceived connectedness.

solutions.solution_candidate: Integrated health-behavior plan: scheduled appointments, simple exercise micro-routines (5-10 min), reminders, and lightweight health-tracker with easy onboarding.
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Regular health behaviors improve energy, mood, and daily functioning, reducing downstream backlog.
solutions.measurement: Appointment adherence; days with exercise; self-rated health.
solutions.mapping_query: Pair health behavior plan with reminders and tracking; monitor adherence and health outcomes.

solutions.predictor_variable: Sleep quality and circadian regulation (Sleep/Circadian restoration)
solutions.solution_candidate: Sleep hygiene optimization: consistent bed/wake times, reduce evening light exposure, limit caffeine after noon; wind-down routine; address nocturnal awakenings.
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Better sleep supports executive function, mood, and energy, enabling greater daily functioning and reduced backlog.
solutions.measurement: Sleep duration consistency; sleep onset latency; next-day energy/mood scale.
solutions.mapping_query: Sleep supports functioning; monitor sleep metrics and adjust routines to protect C08.

solutions.predictor_variable: Negative self-evaluation / shame about life progress (C07)
solutions.solution_candidate: CBT-based cognitive restructuring plus self-compassion training; daily journaling focusing on evidence for progress; affect labeling.
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Reducing self-criticism enhances motivation, persistence, and engagement with daily tasks.
solutions.measurement: Self-criticism scale; daily mood; perceived progress.
solutions.mapping_query: Target C07 with CBT and self-compassion exercises.

solutions.solution_candidate: Daily 2-minute self-check-ins (mood, energy, backlog index) with a simple dashboard; automated feedback to adjust plan; optional wearables for objective signals.
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Quantified feedback enhances self-regulation and allows dynamic tailoring of interventions; backlog sensitivity can be monitored alongside mood and functioning.
solutions.measurement: Composite backlog score; mood rating; adherence to plan; weekly trend.
solutions.safety_notes: Ensure data privacy; provide opt-out if overwhelmed.
solutions.mapping_query: Use self-monitoring to inform multiple criteria (C06/C07/C08) and adjust plans accordingly.
